tagline: Building FMCG brands that families remember
response_text:
# Apex Creative Co.
**Proposal for NourishKids Brand Launch**  
**RFQ Reference:** RFQ-MKT-2026-NKL-001  
**Submitted to:** NourishPlus Foods India Ltd.  
**Date:** 024 July 2026

---

## 1. Cover Note
Dear NourishPlus Foods India Ltd. Team,

Thank you for the opportunity to submit our proposal for the launch of **NourishKids**. Apex Creative Co. is an 18-year-old full-service agency with deep experience in FMCG, family nutrition, packaged foods, and regulated consumer categories. Over the years, we have helped legacy brands modernize, challenger brands scale, and new launches earn trust quickly in crowded categories.

We understand that NourishKids is not just a product launch. It is a brand-building exercise that must balance **parent trust, child appeal, retail visibility, and responsible communication**. In our experience, that combination requires integrated thinking across strategy, creative, film, digital, packaging adaptation, influencer storytelling, and media stewardship.

This proposal has been structured against the RFQ requirements and includes a full-scope plan across all requested line items. Our recommendation is rooted in one strategic idea: **make NourishKids feel nutritious enough for parents, while remaining playful and memorable for children**.

---

## 2. Understanding of Scope
Based on the RFQ, we understand the assignment to include the following 8 line items:

1. Brand and launch strategy  
2. Master campaign creative development  
3. TVC / video asset development in Hindi and English  
4. Social and digital content creation  
5. Influencer / creator activation planning and management  
6. Paid media buying support and coordination  
7. Design adaptation / key visual / POSM and retail launch assets  
8. Reporting, campaign governance, optimization and launch support

Apex is equipped to deliver all eight line items in-house, with specialist film, design, content, and account planning teams.

---

## 3. Proposed Approach by Line Item

### Line Item 1: Brand & Launch Strategy
We will begin with a strategic immersion covering category, competition, parent sentiment, child consumption cues, and channel realities. Deliverables include:
- Brand launch workshop with stakeholder team
- Audience segmentation (parents, caregivers, children by age cluster)
- Positioning framework
- Messaging architecture
- Launch channel strategy
- 12-month communication roadmap

### Line Item 2: Master Campaign Creative Development
We will develop the central campaign thought, visual world, and communication platform.
Deliverables:
- 3 campaign territories
- 2 rounds of refinement
- Final approved campaign platform
- KV direction and copy system
- Tagline exploration and lockup recommendations

### Line Item 3: TVC / Video Asset Development
We propose development of the hero AV campaign anchored in Hindi, with English adaptation. To be transparent, the **English TVC will be adapted from the Hindi master film rather than independently produced as a separate shoot**, unless otherwise requested and separately budgeted.
Deliverables:
- Script development
- Storyboards
- 1 x Hindi TVC master
- 1 x English adapted version
- Cutdowns: 20 sec / 10 sec / digital edits
- Basic supers and end-frame adaptations

### Line Item 4: Social & Digital Content Creation
To sustain launch momentum, we recommend a monthly content engine.
Deliverables:
- 60 social posts per month during campaign period
- Content buckets for nutrition, fun, school-time moments, parent reassurance, and product usage
- Static, motion, reels, and story formats
- Monthly content calendar and approval workflow

### Line Item 5: Influencer / Creator Activation
We recommend a hybrid parenting + mom community + family lifestyle + select child-safe creator ecosystem.
Deliverables:
- Influencer strategy
- Shortlisting and vetting
- Outreach and contracting support
- Content briefing and review
- Performance summary reports

### Line Item 6: Paid Media Buying Support
Apex can support digital and traditional media planning coordination, partner management, release tracking, and reporting.
**Important assumption:** our **media buying commission of 10% is excluded from the proposal total below** and would apply on actual media spends if Apex is appointed to execute media buying.
Deliverables:
- Channel allocation recommendation
- Media plan coordination
- Vendor liaison
- Release management support
- Weekly optimization reviews

### Line Item 7: Design Adaptation / POSM / Retail Assets
Launch consistency at point of sale is critical in FMCG.
Deliverables:
- Key visual adaptations
- Retail danglers / shelf strips / wobblers
- Modern trade display artwork
- E-commerce banners
- Distributor presentation templates
- Launch deck design support

### Line Item 8: Reporting & Campaign Governance
Deliverables:
- Weekly status tracker
- Monthly review meetings
- Campaign dashboard
- Creative and media performance review
- Post-launch learning report

---

## 4. Compliance & Responsible Advertising
Because NourishKids operates in a sensitive food and child-facing context, we propose a formal compliance review process.

Our team is experienced in working with **ASCI** principles for advertising to children and family audiences, including avoiding misleading nutritional superiority claims, exaggerated performance promises, or direct exhortation to children. We also align packaging and communication claims with **FSSAI** requirements and recommend that all nutrition / ingredient / health-related statements be validated by the client’s regulatory and legal teams before release.

Our process includes:
- Internal copy review against ASCI guidance
- Mandatory substantiation check for claims
- FSSAI-sensitive language review for food communication
- Final legal/regulatory checkpoint prior to production release

---

## 5. Pricing

### Itemized Commercials (INR)

| Line Item | Description | Fee (INR) |
|---|---:|---:|
| 1 | Brand & Launch Strategy | 24,00,000 |
| 2 | Master Campaign Creative Development | 38,00,000 |
| 3 | TVC / Video Development (Hindi master + English adaptation + cutdowns) | 1,12,00,000 |
| 4 | Social & Digital Content Creation | 54,00,000 |
| 5 | Influencer Strategy & Management Fee | 18,00,000 |
| 6 | Paid Media Planning / Buying Coordination Fee | 16,00,000 |
| 7 | Design Adaptation / POSM / Retail Assets | 22,00,000 |
| 8 | Reporting, Governance & Optimization Support | 10,00,000 |
|  | **Total Professional Fees** | **2,94,00,000** |

**Notes:**  
- All amounts above are in INR.  
- **GST is extra as applicable.**  
- Third-party media spends are excluded.  
- **Media buying commission of 10% on actual media spends is excluded from the total above.**

---

## 6. Timeline: 28 Weeks

We propose a 28-week launch program as follows:

| Phase | Duration | Activities |
|---|---|---|
| Phase 1 | Weeks 1-4 | Discovery, stakeholder workshop, research synthesis, strategy development |
| Phase 2 | Weeks 5-8 | Campaign territories, messaging framework, KV routes |
| Phase 3 | Weeks 9-12 | Scriptwriting, storyboarding, pre-production planning, influencer strategy |
| Phase 4 | Weeks 13-16 | TVC production, adaptation planning, design development |
| Phase 5 | Weeks 17-20 | Post-production, digital asset creation, content calendar build |
| Phase 6 | Weeks 21-24 | POSM rollout, influencer onboarding, media coordination |
| Phase 7 | Weeks 25-28 | Launch support, optimization, reporting, post-launch review |

This timeline assumes timely client feedback within 3 working days per review round.

---

## 7. Team
- **Business Director** – executive oversight and governance
- **Strategy Lead** – category and audience planning
- **Creative Director** – campaign platform and creative quality
- **Copy Director** – messaging and script development
- **Art Director** – visual system and design supervision
- **Film Producer** – production management
- **Digital Content Lead** – social content engine
- **Influencer Partnerships Manager** – creator program management
- **Account Director** – day-to-day client servicing
- **Project Manager** – timelines, trackers, approvals

---

## 8. Questionnaire Responses
**1. Relevant experience?**  
Yes. Apex has worked across packaged foods, beverages, dairy adjacencies, and family-focused FMCG launches over the past 18 years.

**2. Ability to manage integrated scope?**  
Yes. We offer strategy, creative, production, content, design, and campaign management under one lead team.

**3. Compliance capability?**  
Yes. We maintain internal review processes aligned to ASCI norms and FSSAI-sensitive food communications.

**4. Availability against launch timeline?**  
Yes, subject to project kickoff by August 2026 and timely decision-making.

**5. Financial stability?**  
Apex Creative Co. is an established agency with long-term FMCG clients and stable operating history. Detailed financial documents can be shared under NDA if required.

---

## 9. Assumptions & Exclusions
- Proposal assumes one master Hindi TVC production and one English adaptation.
- Celebrity talent, child talent overages, special music licensing, and extraordinary location fees are excluded unless specifically approved.
- Media spends are excluded.
- Media buying commission of 10% on spend is excluded.
- Translation beyond Hindi and English is excluded.
- More than two major revision rounds per key deliverable may be billed additionally.

---

## 10. Closing
We would be delighted to partner with NourishPlus Foods India Ltd. on building a launch that is credible, culturally resonant, and commercially effective. NourishKids has the potential to become a meaningful household brand, and Apex would be proud to help shape that journey.

Warm regards,  
**Apex Creative Co.**  
Integrated Brand & Communications Partner

tagline: Performance creativity for modern family brands
response_text:
# Spark Digital Agency
**Proposal Submission for NourishKids Brand Launch**  
**RFQ No.:** RFQ-MKT-2026-NKL-001  
**Client:** NourishPlus Foods India Ltd.  
**Date:** 024 July 2026

---

## Hello from Spark
Dear Team NourishPlus,

Thank you for inviting Spark Digital Agency to participate in the NourishKids launch mandate. We are a 6-year-old digital-first boutique agency built for brands that want speed, relevance, and measurable growth. While many agencies still separate “creative” and “performance,” we build campaigns where the idea and the conversion journey work together.

Our strength lies in **paid social, online video, creator ecosystems, launch funnels, and always-on digital storytelling**. We believe NourishKids is especially suited to a digital-first launch because the key decision-makers—mothers, young parents, and caregivers—are highly active across Instagram, YouTube, short-video platforms, and commerce-linked discovery journeys.

We want to be transparent upfront: our strongest capability is in digital launch systems. For television production and large-format broadcast execution, we would recommend production partners and can manage the process from the agency side.

---

## Our Strategic Point of View
For NourishKids, we recommend a launch framework built around three layers:
1. **Trust Layer** – nutrition reassurance, ingredient story, parent confidence
2. **Love Layer** – kid-friendly creative hooks, visual characters, snack-time rituals
3. **Action Layer** – trial, sampling amplification, digital traffic, measurable response

This allows the brand to avoid sounding overly clinical while still earning parent confidence.

---

## Scope Response by Line Item

### 1. Launch Strategy & Digital Go-To-Market
We will lead a digital-first launch strategy covering audience cohorts, funnel design, content pillars, and channel priority.

**Deliverables:**
- Brand launch workshop
- Digital audience mapping
- Paid social and video funnel strategy
- Messaging matrix
- KPI framework and dashboard structure

### 2. Campaign Creative Development
We will develop the master digital campaign platform and online-first communication routes.

**Deliverables:**
- 2-3 digital campaign routes
- Key visual direction
- Copy platform
- Online video scripts

**Important note:** Spark’s scope here is for **digital campaign creative and online video**, **not broadcast TVC creative packaging**.

### 3. Video / AV Production
We can produce launch films, reels, digital edits, and performance video assets suitable for YouTube, Meta, and other online placements.

**Deliverables:**
- Online hero launch video
- 6s / 10s / 15s cutdowns
- Performance ad variants
- Product demo edits / UGC-style edits

**Exclusion / caveat:** This proposal covers **online video only** and **does not include broadcast TVC production**. If NourishPlus requires TVC production, the estimated cost is **TBD — estimated INR 80-120 lakhs, subject to production house RFQ**.

### 4. Social Organic Content
We propose a high-efficiency content engine with monthly planning and agile optimization.

**Deliverables:**
- 50 posts per month
- Mix of static, carousel, reels, and stories
- Monthly content calendar
- Community response recommendations

We have found 50 well-optimized assets often outperform higher-volume publishing with lower quality control.

### 5. Influencer / Creator Marketing
Spark has strong creator network access in parenting, lifestyle, regional micro-influencer, and performance-led affiliate ecosystems.

**Deliverables:**
- Influencer strategy
- Shortlist of creators
- Negotiation and onboarding
- Briefing and content review
- Reporting on reach and engagement

**Influencer fee estimate:**  
- Micro / mid-tier creator pool: **USD 28,000**  
- Agency management fee: **INR 14,00,000**

### 6. Paid Media Buying & Optimization
This is a core Spark capability. We can manage paid social, online video, and digital performance media planning and buying.

**Deliverables:**
- Channel mix recommendation
- Budget allocation by audience and funnel stage
- Campaign setup and trafficking
- Weekly optimization
- Performance dashboard

**Commercial model:** **12% net media buying commission** on actual media spends.

### 7. Design Adaptations / Launch Assets
We can support digital-first asset adaptation for commerce and campaign consistency.

**Deliverables:**
- E-commerce banners
- Marketplace creatives
- Landing page creative inputs
- Digital display adaptations
- Sales deck / launch presentation design

### 8. Reporting & Governance
We believe transparency is central to launch success.

**Deliverables:**
- Weekly WIP tracker
- Monthly reports
- Paid media dashboard
- Influencer summary and optimization notes

---

## Kids / Category Compliance
We understand this is a child/family-facing food category and all communication should be responsibly framed. Spark follows platform policies and standard advertising good practices. For highly specific child-directed advertising, nutrition claims, or food-label-sensitive communication, we would recommend that NourishPlus appoint an **external compliance / legal specialist** for final review, especially before large-scale release.

---

## Commercial Proposal

| Line Item | Description | Fee |
|---|---|---:|
| 1 | Launch Strategy & Digital GTM | INR 12,00,000 |
| 2 | Campaign Creative Development | INR 18,00,000 |
| 3 | Online Video Production Package | INR 32,00,000 |
| 4 | Social Organic Content (50 posts/month) | INR 24,00,000 |
| 5 | Influencer Fees | USD 28,000 |
| 5A | Influencer Management Fee | INR 14,00,000 |
| 6 | Paid Media Buying Commission | 12% net on media spends |
| 7 | Design Adaptations / Launch Assets | INR 9,00,000 |
| 8 | Reporting & Governance | INR 6,00,000 |

**Indicative agency fees subtotal (excluding influencer pass-through and media commission): INR 1,15,00,000**  
**TVC / broadcast production:** TBD — estimated INR 80-120 lakhs, subject to production house RFQ  
**GST:** extra as applicable

---

## Timeline
Spark can move fast on digital deliverables.

- **10-12 weeks for digital deliverables** from formal kickoff
- Strategy and campaign route: 2-3 weeks
- Content system and paid media setup: 3-4 weeks
- Influencer onboarding: 2-3 weeks parallel
- Online video production: 4-6 weeks depending on approvals
- **TVC timeline: TBD** based on production house selection and scope finalization

---

## Proposed Team
- Founder / Strategy Director
- Performance Marketing Lead
- Creative Strategist
- Art Lead
- Content Manager
- Paid Social Specialist
- Influencer Partnerships Lead
- Account Manager

For TVC or larger film production, we would onboard an external producer / production partner.

---

## Questionnaire Responses
**1. Relevant experience?**  
Yes. Spark has launched D2C, food, beverage, wellness, and family-oriented brands across digital channels.

**2. Ability to manage integrated campaign?**  
Yes for digital, creator, and performance-led launch systems. For broadcast-scale TVC, we recommend partner support.

**3. Compliance capability?**  
We follow standard platform and advertising best practices and recommend specialist review for children’s category sensitivities.

**4. Availability and launch readiness?**  
Yes, we can begin immediately upon appointment.

**5. Financial stability?**  
—

---

## Assumptions & Exclusions
- Proposal is primarily digital-first in nature.
- Broadcast TVC is not included in the current fixed fee and is subject to separate RFQ and production house costing.
- Influencer pass-through fees are estimated in USD and may vary by creator availability and exchange rates.
- Media spends are excluded; media buying billed at 12% net.
- Community management beyond standard moderation recommendations is excluded.
- Website / tech development is excluded unless separately scoped.

---

## Closing Note
Spark would love to partner on making NourishKids a digitally native, culturally current, and measurable launch. If the objective is to build strong traction with modern parents through content, creators, and performance media, we believe we can add real value from day one.

Best regards,  
**Spark Digital Agency**

pricing_summary.total_stated: INR 1,15,00,000 + USD 28,000 + 12% net media commission; TVC TBD

tagline: End-to-end ideas, execution and scale for ambitious brands
response_text:
# Brandsmith Group
**Integrated Proposal for NourishKids Launch Campaign**  
**RFQ:** RFQ-MKT-2026-NKL-001  
**Submitted to:** NourishPlus Foods India Ltd.  
**Date:** 024 July 2026

---

## Executive Summary
Dear NourishPlus Team,

Thank you for the opportunity to present Brandsmith Group for the NourishKids brand launch. We are a 12-year full-service agency with strategic, creative, digital, production and media capabilities under one roof. We have built launches for food, snacks, family brands and mass-market consumer products, and we are confident that NourishKids can be taken from concept to market with sharp positioning and visible impact.

We are pleased to submit our **all-inclusive proposal of INR 3,90,00,000** for the complete mandate. With our integrated operating model and fast-track workflows, we believe the campaign can be **live in 6-8 weeks** from appointment.

Our recommendation is to build NourishKids as a brand that speaks to “growing fun with everyday goodness” — a platform that can travel across TV, digital, influencer, retail and school-adjacent touchpoints.

---

## Why Brandsmith
- 12 years in integrated brand building
- Dedicated team of **15 specialists** for this business
- In-house strategy, creative, digital, studio and account management
- Experience in food and family categories including **Haldirams Snacks** and other household brands
- Strong execution discipline with senior leadership involvement

We see this as a scale launch, not merely a campaign burst.

---

## Scope of Work by Line Item

### 1. Brand Strategy & Launch Planning
We will conduct a rapid strategic immersion and define the launch framework.

**Deliverables:**
- Stakeholder workshop
- Consumer and competition scan
- Brand positioning recommendation
- Messaging framework
- Launch architecture

### 2. Campaign Idea Development
We will create the central campaign platform and communication system for launch.

**Deliverables:**
- 3 creative routes
- Tagline options
- Key visual design direction
- Parent-facing and child-facing message ladder

### 3. TVC / Film Production
Brandsmith proposes **2 x 30 sec TVCs in Hindi** as the anchor launch assets, supported by digital cutdowns.

**Deliverables:**
- Script development
- Storyboard
- Production and post-production
- Hindi master films
- 10 sec and 15 sec cutdowns

**Additional note:** English version can be produced at **extra INR 8,00,000**.

### 4. Social & Organic Content
We recommend a focused and quality-led content system instead of excessive posting frequency.

**Deliverables:**
- **45 posts per month**
- Static creatives, reels, festive hooks, product stories
- Monthly calendar
- Brand page visual consistency

In our experience, 45 stronger assets can outperform 60 generic posts.

### 5. Influencer Marketing
We will identify family, mom, food and regional creators to generate awareness and trust.

**Deliverables:**
- Influencer shortlist
- Outreach and negotiation
- Content brief
- Reporting

### 6. Paid Media Buying
Our integrated model includes media stewardship and buying support in the all-inclusive package. We can manage planning, release tracking, and optimization across channels.

**Deliverables:**
- Media approach
- Buying support
- Release management
- Optimization inputs

### 7. Retail / POSM / Adaptation Design
We will adapt the campaign to retail and channel execution.

**Deliverables:**
- POSM artworks
- Modern trade adaptation
- E-commerce creatives
- Sales support deck
- Key visual adaptations

### 8. Reporting & Account Governance
We will provide centralized campaign management and review structures.

**Deliverables:**
- Weekly status report
- Monthly review
- Performance summary
- Final wrap-up report

---

## Compliance
All creatives developed by Brandsmith will be **ASCI compliant**. We are mindful of food category sensitivity and family-oriented communication norms and will ensure all output is aligned before release.

---

## Commercials

| Line Item | Description | Amount (INR) |
|---|---|---:|
| 1 | Brand Strategy & Launch Planning | 20,00,000 |
| 2 | Campaign Idea Development | 32,00,000 |
| 3 | TVC Production – 2 x 30 sec Hindi films | 1,20,00,000 |
| 4 | Social Content Development | 36,00,000 |
| 5 | Influencer Marketing Program Management | 28,00,000 |
| 6 | Paid Media Buying Support | 35,00,000 |
| 7 | Retail / POSM / Adaptation Design | 55,00,000 |
| 8 | Reporting & Governance | 38,00,000 |
|  | **Itemized Total** | **3,64,00,000** |

**Proposal Total (all-inclusive): INR 3,90,00,000**  
**GST:** extra as applicable

The above commercials are valid for 30 days from date of submission.

---

## Timeline
At a high level, we can target campaign go-live in **6-8 weeks** with aligned approvals and fast-track sign-off.

### Detailed Workplan
| Phase | Duration | Activities |
|---|---|---|
| Phase 1 | Weeks 1-2 | Kickoff, immersion, strategic inputs |
| Phase 2 | Weeks 3-4 | Creative routes, messaging, approvals |
| Phase 3 | Weeks 5-7 | Script development, storyboard, pre-production |
| Phase 4 | Weeks 8-10 | Production and post-production |
| Phase 5 | Weeks 11-13 | Social content creation, influencer onboarding, POSM design |
| Phase 6 | Weeks 14-16 | Deployment support, reporting setup, optimization |

Depending on stakeholder turnaround, some tracks can run in parallel.

---

## Team
Below is the core team proposed on the business:
- Client Partner
- Strategy Director
- Creative Director
- Art Director
- Copy Lead
- Digital Manager
- Account Manager
- Project Coordinator

This core team will also draw on wider Brandsmith specialist resources as needed.

---

## Questionnaire Responses
**1. Relevant category experience?**  
Yes. We have worked on food and family-facing brands, including Haldirams Snacks, giving us strong understanding of household consumption behavior.

**2. Can you manage end-to-end scope?**  
Yes, Brandsmith is a full-service agency and can manage strategy, creative, production, digital, influencer and media support.

**3. Compliance capability?**  
Yes, all work will be ASCI compliant.

**4. Team availability?**  
Yes, we can allocate a dedicated team immediately after award.

**5. Financial stability?**  
Brandsmith Group is a stable mid-market agency with a diversified client portfolio and sound operating track record.

---

## Assumptions
- Scope assumes Hindi film production only as base scope.
- English film / versioning is additional at INR 8,00,000.
- Client to provide product packs, claims, and legal-approved information.
- Timelines assume consolidated feedback from client side.
- Paid media buying is included in the all-inclusive package structure.

---

## Exclusions
- Celebrity fees excluded
- Media spends excluded
- Printing / fabrication at actuals unless specified
- Any additional language adaptation excluded
- **Travel outside Mumbai at actuals**

---

## Closing
We would be excited to help NourishKids enter the market with clarity, energy and scale. Brandsmith brings integrated thinking, practical execution and a strong appetite for launch intensity. We believe this partnership can create not just initial awareness, but a durable brand foundation.

Sincerely,  
**Brandsmith Group**
